exports.name: AxiosWrapper
exports.description: A wrapper around Axios that adds automatic cancellation of concurrent requests, CSRF token support, default header management, and optional request collection/logging. Intended to be subclassed to create typed API clients.

static_properties.name: DEFAULT_TIMEOUT
static_properties.description: Default request timeout in milliseconds. Value: 60000.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Configuration options including axios config, apiEndpoint, collector settings, and csrfHeaderName.

methods.name: setApiEndpoint
methods.description: Sets the API endpoint prefix. Supports the placeholder `%CURRENT_HOST%` which is replaced with `location.host` in browser environments.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: The endpoint string to set. Defaults to empty string.

methods.name: setCSRFToken
methods.description: Sets the CSRF token which will be added as a default header on all POST, PUT, and DELETE requests. The header name is configured via `csrfHeaderName` constructor option (default: 'X-CSRF-Token').

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The CSRF token value to set.

methods.name: setDefaultHeader
methods.signature: setDefaultHeader({ name, value, methods }: { name: string; value: string; methods?: string[] }): void
methods.description: Adds a default header to all requests or to requests for specific HTTP methods.

parameters.name: methods
parameters.description: Array of HTTP method names (e.g. ['get', 'post']) to apply the header to. If omitted, the header is applied to all methods via `common`.

methods.name: collectRequest
methods.description: Records a request into the internal collector. Only stores data when `collectRequests` or `collectErrors` collector settings are configured.

parameters.name: info
parameters.description: Object containing method, url, data, requestStart timestamp, response, responseError, error flag, and cancelled flag.

methods.name: getCollectedRequests
methods.description: Returns a snapshot of all collected requests and errors stored by the collector.

methods.name: request
methods.description: Core method that dispatches an HTTP request via axios. Handles concurrent request cancellation, custom headers, timeout, download progress, error collection, and retry delegation via `handleRequestError`.

parameters.name: methodParams
parameters.description: Object containing method, url, data, params, options (concurrentId, collectRequest, timeout, headers, requestConfig, onDownloadProgress), and retries count.

methods.name: cancelRequest
methods.description: Manually cancels a pending request identified by its `concurrentId`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The concurrentId of the request to cancel.

methods.name: get
methods.signature: get<T = any>(url: string, params: ApiMethodParams['params'], options?: ApiMethodParams['options']): Promise<T>

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Request options including concurrentId, collectRequest, timeout, headers, requestConfig, onDownloadProgress.

methods.name: post
methods.signature: post<T = any>(url: string, data: unknown, params: ApiMethodParams['params'], options?: ApiMethodParams['options']): Promise<T>

methods.name: put
methods.signature: put<T = any>(url: string, data: unknown, params: ApiMethodParams['params'], options?: ApiMethodParams['options']): Promise<T>

methods.name: patch
methods.signature: patch<T = any>(url: string, data: unknown, params: ApiMethodParams['params'], options?: ApiMethodParams['options']): Promise<T>

methods.name: delete
methods.signature: delete<T = any>(url: string, data: unknown, params: ApiMethodParams['params'], options?: ApiMethodParams['options']): Promise<T>

methods.name: head
methods.signature: head<T = any>(url: string, params: ApiMethodParams['params'], options?: ApiMethodParams['options']): Promise<T>

methods.name: apiPath
methods.description: Constructs a full API path by prepending the configured `apiEndpoint` to the given path segment.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: The path segment to append to the API endpoint.

methods.name: handleRequestError
methods.signature: protected handleRequestError<T>(response: unknown, request: () => Promise<T>, retries: number, error: Error): Promise<T> | unknown
methods.description: Called by `request` when an HTTP error occurs. The default implementation re-throws the error response. Subclasses override this method to implement custom error handling, retry logic, or error transformation. The `request` callback can be called to retry the original request (incrementing the internal retry counter automatically).

parameters.name: response
parameters.description: The error response object from axios, or a plain object derived from the thrown error.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: A callback that retries the original request with the retry counter incremented. Call this to implement retry logic.

parameters.name: retries
parameters.description: The number of retries already attempted for this request.

parameters.name: error
parameters.description: A normalized Error object wrapping the original thrown error.

exports.name: ApiMethodParams
exports.description: Parameters object accepted by the `request` method and underlying HTTP method helpers.

properties.name: retries
properties.description: Number of retries already attempted. Used internally by the retry mechanism.

properties.name: concurrentId
properties.description: If set, any prior in-flight request with the same ID is cancelled before this request is sent.

properties.name: collectRequest
properties.description: Whether to log this request to the collector. Defaults to true.

properties.name: timeout
properties.description: Request-level timeout in milliseconds, overrides instance default.

properties.name: requestConfig
properties.description: Additional raw axios request config merged into the request.

properties.name: onDownloadProgress
properties.description: Callback for file download progress events.

properties.name: config
properties.description: Axios instance configuration. Merged with defaults (withCredentials: true, timeout: 60000, xsrfCookieName: '').

properties.name: apiEndpoint
properties.description: Base API endpoint prefix prepended by `apiPath()`. Defaults to '/api'. Supports '%CURRENT_HOST%' placeholder.

properties.name: collector
properties.description: Request collector configuration controlling how many requests and errors are retained in memory.

properties.name: csrfHeaderName
properties.description: Header name used for CSRF token injection. Defaults to 'X-CSRF-Token'.
